content.full_text:
Senate California Legislature

STATE SENATOR
REBECCA Q. MORGAN
ELEVENTH DISTRICT

February 5, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Sir/Madam:

I am requesting an opinion regarding the use of so-called "restricted campaign funds."

In 1989, Becky Morgan For Senate '92, a candidate-controlled committee, was formed. This committee has received contributions since January 1, 1989. In addition, this committee received "non-restricted" money which met the Proposition 73 guidelines from the Friends of Becky Morgan committee (also a candidate-controlled committee). The Friends committee has only "restricted funds" remaining (money which exceeded the Prop. 73 limits).

I understand that there may no longer be a classification known as "restricted funds". Therefore, can I transfer the remaining funds from Friends of Becky Morgan to Becky Morgan For Senate '92, or is it necessary to continue two separate bank accounts and committees?

Please advise.

Sincerely,

Kelly Barrales
Treasurer, Friends of Becky Morgan
Treasurer, Becky Morgan For Senate '92
460 2nd Avenue
Redwood City, CA 94063
(415) 366-2312
